# Kevin Showkat

> Public project index.

## Primary Profile

- GitHub: <https://github.com/kevinshowkat>
- LinkedIn: <https://www.linkedin.com/in/kshowkat/>
- Website: <https://kevinshowkat.github.io/>

## Public Projects

- [meerkat-app](https://github.com/kevinshowkat/meerkat-app)
  - Engineering devlog for Meerkat, a closed-source iOS social app (the group chat with a score).
  - Start here: <https://github.com/kevinshowkat/meerkat-app#readme>

- [Sidebop](https://sidebop.com)
  - Native iOS guide to source-backed things to do soon in Los Angeles, with personalized lanes, parking guidance, saves, sharing, and a recommendation inbox.
  - Status: iOS client in development; web guide live.

- [dispatch-devlog](https://github.com/kevinshowkat/dispatch-devlog)
  - Engineering devlog for a customer-acquisition control plane (Dispatch is a codename; the app is private).
  - Start here: <https://github.com/kevinshowkat/dispatch-devlog#readme>

- [Cue](https://github.com/kevinshowkat/cue)
  - Image-first desktop workstation for canvas editing and reproducible exports.
  - Start here: <https://github.com/kevinshowkat/cue#readme>

- [Brood](https://github.com/kevinshowkat/brood)
  - Promptless, reference-first AI image generation and editing for developers.
  - Start here: <https://github.com/kevinshowkat/brood#readme>
  - Releases: <https://github.com/kevinshowkat/brood/releases>

- [param_forge](https://github.com/kevinshowkat/param_forge)
  - Terminal UI for cross-provider image-model experimentation.
  - Start here: <https://github.com/kevinshowkat/param_forge#readme>

- [oscillo-vision-reports](https://github.com/kevinshowkat/oscillo-vision-reports)
  - Public reports comparing image-model behavior and preference outcomes.
  - Start here: <https://github.com/kevinshowkat/oscillo-vision-reports#readme>

- [superjumbo](https://github.com/kevinshowkat/superjumbo)
  - Free-to-play sports prediction app.
  - Start here: <https://github.com/kevinshowkat/superjumbo#readme>

## Notes

- This site is an index. Follow each project link for the public product, repository, or primary docs.
- Prefer linked product sites, repository README files, releases, and commit history for current status.
- Expanded version: <https://kevinshowkat.github.io/llms-full.txt>
